heading: Establishment of a policy on stalking
label: 2507f Establishment of a policy on stalking

children.text: requires an immediate, effective, and thorough response from the Peace Corps upon receipt of a report of stalking;
provides, during training, all Peace Corps volunteers with a point of contact for the reporting of stalking; and
protects the confidentiality of volunteers who report stalking to the maximum extent practicable.

children.heading: Development and consultation with experts
children.label: b Development and consultation with experts
children.text: In developing the stalking policy under subsection (a), the President shall consult with and incorporate, as appropriate, the recommendations and views of those with expertise regarding the crime of stalking.

children.heading: Training of in-country staff
children.label: c Training of in-country staff
children.text: The President shall provide for the training of all in-country staff regarding the stalking policy developed under subsection (a).
